Bedroom.Body: Time for bed! But wait, where's Pacho? You can't go to sleep without ensuring he's okay!

Living Room.Body: The living room, the hub of the home.

Kitchen.Body: A bag of treats sit next to the leftover pizza on the counter. Will treats help lure Pacho out?

Grab Treats.Body: You pick up the bag of treats sitting on the counter.

Front Porch.Body: The wind chills your neck. Maybe Pacho snuck out?

Bathroom.Body: I think Pacho is afraid of the bathtub. No way he's in here.

Items.Not Useful Text: You shake the bag of treats around but nothing happens.
Items.Useful Text: You shake the bag of treats and a stray cat appears holding a ...bird in it's mouth? Oh! It's just a toy. You lay some treats down, taking the toy bird it drops as it begins feasting on the morsels.

Items.Not Useful Text: You flip a switch that starts making the toy bird chirp. Hmm, nothing.
Items.Useful Text:
You flip a switch that starts making the toy bird chirp. Wait, there's some tousling and...
Pacho climbs out from inside the chimney. It's looking like a pre-bed bath will be needed, but at the end of the day, you're relieved to have found him in one piece.
